mapper.select: select p.id, o.order_code, w.title as work_title, sm.nickname as seller_name, sm.id as seller_id, o.order_type, p.total_price, p.total_fee, p.total_price - p.total_fee as settlement_amount, bm.nickname as buyer_name, bm.email as buyer_email, p.pay_method, c.card_number_masked as card_number, to_char(p.paid_at, 'YY.MM.DD HH24:MI') as paid_at, p.payment_code, p.status from tbl_payment p join tbl_order o on p.order_code = o.order_code join tbl_member bm on p.buyer_id = bm.id join tbl_member sm on p.seller_id = sm.id left join tbl_work w on p.work_id = w.id left join tbl_card c on p.card_id = c.id where p.id = #{id}
